title: layia carnosa
intro: Layia carnosa, also known as the desert marigold or bush marigold, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihemorrhagic effects. The health benefits of Layia carnosa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Layia carnosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal and health benefits.
